about.heading: About Your Salon
body: Your Salon is a professional nail salon. We believe that beautiful nails begin with exceptional hygiene and genuine care — which is why every visit starts and ends with your safety and comfort in mind.

We are a family business with years of experience in the industry. We do this work out of love — for the craft, but above all for the people. Our greatest joy is taking care of you and seeing you leave with a smile.

Our team brings years of experience in nail artistry. That expertise shows in every detail — clean lines, long-lasting sets and flawless finishes, whether you come in for a natural manicure or a full set with custom nail art.

We operate dedicated disinfection stations, sanitize every tool after each use, maintain sanitized pedicure stations, and use dust collectors at all manicure stations. This isn't a checklist — it's simply how we work.
From maintenance fills to manicures and pedicures, we offer a full range of services designed to fit your schedule. Our starting prices are posted clearly, with no surprises.
We know life doesn't always go to plan. That's why walk-ins are always welcome alongside booked appointments — and no deposit is required, with or without an appointment.
At Your Salon, you are our family. We look forward to taking care of you — come see us at our location.

bookOnline.intro: Reserve your appointment at Your Salon. Choose your service and book in seconds — or simply walk in.

steps.title: Choose your service
steps.body: Nail enhancements, fills, manicures or pedicures — pick what suits you.

steps.title: Book in seconds
steps.body: Choose the time slot that works for you and confirm online. No deposit required.

steps.title: Or simply walk in
steps.body: Walk-ins are always welcome at Your Salon.

reviews.ctaPrompt: Ready to experience the Your Salon difference?

pose-ongles.title: Nail Enhancements at Your Salon
pose-ongles.whyUs: Clients trust Your Salon for consistent, high-quality results. Our team's experience means you'll leave with nails that look exactly how you imagined — and a salon experience that puts your safety first.
pose-ongles.hygiene: Your safety is our priority. We operate dedicated disinfection stations, sanitize every tool after each use, and use dust collectors at every manicure station — the hygiene standard behind every service.

remplissage.title: Nail Fill at Your Salon
remplissage.whyUs: Regular fills at Your Salon maintain the quality and longevity of your enhancements. Our experience means we'll assess your nails at each visit and recommend the right approach to keep them strong and beautiful.
remplissage.hygiene: Every tool is disinfected after each use at our dedicated disinfection stations. Your safety comes first at every appointment.

soins-mains.title: Manicure at Your Salon
intro: A classic manicure at Your Salon is thorough, precise and relaxing. We shape your nails, care for your cuticles and finish with your choice of polish — leaving your hands looking clean, polished and well-groomed.
Whether you want a simple polish change or a complete hand care treatment, our experienced team takes the time to do it properly. No rushing, no cutting corners.
soins-mains.whyUs: With years of experience and an unwavering commitment to hygiene, Your Salon delivers manicure results you can count on. Our sanitized tools and careful technique mean every visit is as safe as it is beautiful.

soins-pieds.title: Pedicure at Your Salon
soins-pieds.whyUs: Sanitized pedicure stations are a non-negotiable at Your Salon. Combined with years of experience and tools disinfected after every use, you can relax knowing your treatment is as hygienic as it is enjoyable.

faq.intro: Everything you need to know before your visit to Your Salon.

items.a: We are at 123 Example Street, City, Region A1A 1A1. Parking is available nearby.

items.q: Do you take walk-ins or is it appointment only?
items.a: Both. We welcome walk-ins when we have availability, and we encourage booking ahead to guarantee your time — especially evenings and weekends.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Book online any time through our Book Online page, or call us at (000) 000-0000. Walk-ins are always welcome too.
Nail enhancements (full set), fills, manicures and pedicures. See our Services page for details and pricing.

items.q: How do you keep tools and stations clean?
items.a: Hygiene is our top priority. We have dedicated disinfection stations, tools are disinfected after every use, pedicure stations are sanitized between clients, and dust collectors are installed at every manicure station.
Yes — gift cards are available online for any amount (delivered by email), or you can purchase one in person at the salon.

items.q: Do you speak French and English?
items.a: Yes. Our team welcomes you in both French and English.

items.q: How often should I get a fill?
items.a: Usually every 2 to 3 weeks, to keep your set looking neat and strong.

items.q: What if I'm not completely happy with my service?
items.a: Let us know before you leave — we'll gladly fix anything that isn't quite right.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept all common payment methods: cash, debit, major credit cards, and contactless or mobile payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay).

reviewsPage.intro: Hear from the clients who trust us with their nails at Your Salon.

intro: At Your Salon, our goal is to give every client a professional, safe and high-quality experience. So that everything goes smoothly — and everyone is treated fairly — we invite you to read the policies below before your appointment. By booking with us, you accept these terms.
These policies apply to all services offered at Your Salon.

blocks.text: Booking an appointment is recommended to reserve the time and technician of your choice. Walk-in clients are welcome, subject to availability.
Please arrive 5 to 10 minutes before your appointment time for check-in.
Out of respect for our team and other clients, we ask for at least 24 hours' notice for any cancellation or change to an appointment.
Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee, and certain bookings may require a deposit at the time of booking. Any such fees are communicated to you when you book.

Prices are shown in Canadian dollars and are subject to applicable taxes. The final price may vary depending on length, design complexity and add-ons; any surcharge is communicated before the service begins.
We accept cash, debit and major credit cards. Tips are appreciated but never required.

items: Gift cards can be purchased online for any amount and delivered by email, or purchased in person at the salon.
Gift cards are non-refundable and should be treated like cash.
We cannot replace a lost or stolen gift card.

blocks.text: Your satisfaction matters to us. Please check the result before leaving so any concern can be addressed right away. If you notice a technical issue with your service after you leave, contact us within 7 days so we can assess the situation and, where appropriate, provide a complimentary fix for the same shape, length and design.
Changes of preference, normal wear and damage from daily life or at-home care are not covered.

items: Dedicated disinfection stations are in operation at all times.
All tools are disinfected after every client.
Pedicure stations are sanitized between every appointment.
Dust collectors are installed at every manicure station.

blocks.text: Please reschedule if you are unwell, and let us know of any medical condition, allergy or sensitivity so we can adapt the service safely.
By booking and receiving services at Your Salon, you acknowledge that you have read and accepted these policies. We thank you for choosing us and look forward to taking care of you.

intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Your Salon collects, uses and protects your personal information when you visit our website, book an appointment or receive our services.
By using our website or our services, you accept the practices described in this policy.

items: Contact details you provide when booking or sending a message (name, phone, email).
Appointment details: services booked, date, time and service history.
Newsletter subscriptions: your email address, if you choose to join.
Limited technical data (device type, pages viewed) to operate and improve the site.
Schedule, confirm and manage your appointments;
Respond to requests sent through our contact form;
Send offers and updates if you subscribe to our newsletter;
Meet our legal and accounting obligations under applicable law.

blocks.text: We do not sell your personal information and do not share it for marketing purposes without your consent. We share information with service providers (for example, our online booking and payment platform) only as needed to deliver their services.
You can unsubscribe from our newsletter at any time, and you may request access to or correction of your information by contacting us at hello@example.com.
We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, use or disclosure.
